title: Tridactyle frommiana
taxonomy: Tridactyle frommiana is a species of orchid in the family Orchidaceae. It is native to tropical Africa and is known for its unique and striking appearance. The classification of Tridactyle frommiana is as follows: it belongs to the genus Tridactyle and the subtribe Spiranthinae within the orchid family. The exact classification within the Spiranthinae subtribe is unclear, and further research is needed to determine its exact position. More specific classification details are required for a more accurate answer.

It is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help treat various health conditions.
